adaptmesh.name: adaptmesh
adaptmesh.signature: mesh Thnew = adaptmesh(Th, [fx, fy], hmin=HMin, hmax=HMax, err=Err, errg=ErrG, nbvx=NbVx, nbsmooth=NbSmooth, nbjacoby=NbJacoby, ratio=Ratio, omega=Omega, iso=Iso, abserror=AbsError, cutoff=CutOff, verbosity=Verbosity, inquire=Inquire, splitpbedge=SplitPbEdge, maxsubdiv=MaxSubdiv, rescaling=Rescaling, keepbackvertices=KeepBackVertices, IsMetric=isMetric, power=Power, thetamax=ThetaMax, splitin2=SplitIn2, metric=Metric, nomeshgeneration=NoMeshGeneration, periodic=Periodic);

adj.name: adj
adj.description: Adjacent triangle of the triangle k by the edge e

affinecg.name: affinecg
affinecg.signature: int Conv = AffineCG(A, x, precon=Precon, nbiter=NbIter, eps=Eps, veps=VEps, stop=Stop);

affinegmres.name: affinegmres
affinegmres.signature: int Conv = AffineGMRES(A, x, precon=Precon, nbiter=NbIter, eps=Eps, veps=VEps, stop=Stop);

arg.name: arg
arg.description: Return the argument of a complex number.

assert.name: assert
assert.description: Verify if a condition is true (same as C), if not the program stops.

atan2.name: atan2
atan2.description: arctan(y/x) function, returning the correct sign for theta.

atoi.name: atoi
atoi.description: Convert a string to an integer.

atof.name: atof
atof.description: Convert a string to a real.

buildmesh.name: buildmesh
buildmesh.description: Build a 2D mesh using border elements.
buildmesh.signature: mesh Th = buildmesh(b1(nn) + b2(nn) + b3(nn) + b4(nn),[points=Points], ][nbvx=Nbvx], [fixedborder=FixedBorder]);

change.name: change
change.description: Change a property of a mesh.

checkmovemesh.name: checkmovemesh
checkmovemesh.description: Check a movemesh without mesh generation.

complexeigenvalue.name: complexeigenvalue
complexeigenvalue.description: Same as EigenValue for complex problems.
complexeigenvalue.signature: int k = complexEigenValue(A, B, nev=Nev, sigma=Sigma);

conj.name: conj
conj.description: Calculate the conjuguate of a complex number.
conj.signature: complex C1 = 1 + i; complex C2 = conj(C1);

convect.name: convect
convect.signature: real cgm = convect([Ux, Uy], dt, c); real cgm = convect([Ux, Uy, Uz], dt, c);

dist.name: dist
dist.signature: dist(a, b) = sqrt(a^2 + b^2); dist(a, b, c) = sqrt(a^2 + b^2 + c^2);

dumptable.name: dumptable
dumptable.description: Show all types, operators and functions in FreeFEM.

eigenvalue.name: eigenvalue
eigenvalue.description: Compute the generalized eigenvalue of Au=lambda Bu. The shifted-inverse method is used by default with sigma=sigma, the shift of the method. The function EigenValue can be used for either matrices or functions returning a matrix vector product.

imag.name: imag
imag.description: Imaginary part of a complex number.
imag.signature: complex c = 1. + i; real Im = imag(c);

interpolate.name: interpolate
interpolate.description: Interpolation operator from a finite element space to another.

invdiff.name: invdiff
invdiff.signature: invdiff(a, b) = (abs(a-b) < 10^(-30)) ? (a-b) : 1/(a-b); invdiff(a, b, e) = (abs(a-b) < e) ? (a-b) : 1/(a-b)

j0.name: j0
j0.description: Bessel function of first kind, order 0.

j1.name: j1
j1.description: Bessel function of first kind, order 1.

jn.name: jn
jn.description: Bessel function of first kind, order n.

linearcg.name: linearcg
linearcg.signature: int Conv = LinearCG(A, x, precon=Precon, nbiter=NbIter, eps=Eps, veps=VEps, stop=Stop);

lineargmres.name: lineargmres
lineargmres.signature: int Conv = LinearGMRES(A, x, precon=Precon, nbiter=NbIter, eps=Eps, veps=VEps, stop=Stop);

lgamma.name: lgamma
lgamma.description: Natural logarithm of the absolute value of the Gamma function of x.

lround.name: lround
lround.description: Round a value, and return an integer value.

ltime.name: ltime
ltime.description: Return the current time since the Epoch.

max.name: max
max.description: Maximum value of two, three or four values.
max.signature: real m = max(a, b); real m = max(a, b, c); real m = max(a, b, c, d);

min.name: min
min.description: Minimum value of two, three or four values.
min.signature: real m = min(a, b); real m = min(a, b, c); real m = min(a, b, c, d);

movemesh.name: movemesh
movemesh.signature: mesh MovedTh = movemesh(Th, [Dx, Dy]); mesh3 MovedTh = movemesh(Th, [Dx, Dy, Dz], [region=Region], [label=Label], [facemerge=FaceMerge], [ptmerge=PtMerge], [orientation=Orientation]);

nlcg.name: nlcg
nlcg.signature: int Conv = NLCG(DJ, u, nbiter=NbIter, eps=Eps);

randinit.name: randinit
randinit.description: Initialize the state vector by using a seed.

randint31.name: randint31
randint31.description: Generate unsigned int (31 bits) random number.

randint32.name: randint32
randint32.description: Generate unsigned int (32 bits) random number.

readmesh.name: readmesh
readmesh.description: Read a 2D mesh file at different formats (see Mesh Generation).

readmesh3.name: readmesh3
readmesh3.description: Read a 3D mesh file at different formats (see Mesh Generation).

real.name: real
real.description: Return the real part of a complex number.

rint.name: rint
rint.description: Integer value nearest to x (real value).

savemesh.name: savemesh
savemesh.description: Save a 2D or 3D mesh in different formats (see Mesh Generation 2D and Mesh Generation 3D).

set.name: set
set.description: Set a property to a matrix. See matrix.

splitmesh.name: splitmesh
splitmesh.description: Split mesh triangles according to a function.

square.name: square
square.description: (1) Square of a number: square(a) → a². (2) Build a structured square mesh: square(nx, ny).
square.signature:
(1) real S = square(a);
 (2) mesh Th = square(nnX, nnY, [[L*x, H*y]], [flags=Flags], [label=Labels], [region=Region]);

storagetotal.name: storagetotal
storagetotal.description: C++ strtod function (Return the total storage in bytes.)

strtol.name: strtol
strtol.description: Convert a string to a long integer.

tgamma.name: tgamma
tgamma.description: Calculate the Gamma function of x.

y0.name: y0
y0.description: Bessel function of second kind, order 0.

y1.name: y1
y1.description: Bessel function of second kind, order 1.

yn.name: yn
yn.description: Bessel function of second kind, order n.
